{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = 359th Year of the Damascan Calendar
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The current year is the [[359th Year of the Damascan Calendar]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
